positive: Minimalist vector graphic illustration of a majestic crescent moon cradling a trio of stylized, bioluminescent constellations. The stars are abstract geometric shapes—triangles, spirals, and dots—emitting soft, neon cyan and deep indigo light. The overall composition is highly symmetrical and circular, suitable for a central apparel print. Use clean linework, flat color blocking, and high contrast against a deep, saturated midnight blue background. Style must be modern mid-century modern Scandinavian flat design, with crisp, solid shapes and a clean silhouette. Focus on negative space and perfect edges. Rule of thirds composition, centered.
